rules.//: EMDR BLS — Realtime Database security rules. Replaces the expiring 30-day test-mode rules. Patient (Quest) client is UNAUTHENTICATED (REST), so session reads, pin reads, and status writes must stay public; the therapist dashboard is authenticated with auth.uid === roomId. The critical hardening: only the authenticated room owner may WRITE the live session, so an attacker can't control or inject into a patient's headset.

$pin..write: auth != null && newData.val() === auth.uid && (!data.exists() || data.val() === auth.uid)
